name: International Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 large green bell pepper, sliced into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken and pat it dry.
2. In a bowl, combine 1/4 cup flour, salt, curry powder, and pepper.
3. Dust the chicken pieces well with the flour mixture.
4. Place the coated chicken in the Crock-Pot.
5. Mix in chopped vegetables, garlic, and raisins.
6. Pour the mashed tomatoes over all.
7. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours or on High for 3 to 4 hours.
8. Remove the chicken pieces to a warm platter.
9. Thicken the sauce by stirring a smooth paste of 3 tablespoons flour and water into the sauce in the Crock-Pot.
10. Cover and cook on High until the sauce is thickened.
11. Serve over rice, especially saffron rice.
12. Serves 4
